title: ReinforcementDensity
description: ReinforcementDensity: The reinforcement density of an element and its material.

Density.description: The mass of reinforcement per unit volume of the element that owns this fragment. Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

Material.description: Homogeneous material of the reinforcement. IMaterialFragment: Base interface for structural materials used by structural properties or as a fragment of the physical material.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
